texto: I hold strongly to this: that it is better to be impetuous than circumspect
autor: because fortune is a woman and if she is to be submissive it is necessary to beat and coerce her.
explicacao: Citação de because fortune is a woman and if she is to be submissive it is necessary to beat and coerce her. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “I hold strongly to this: that it is better to be impetuous than circumspect” articula reflexao, niccolo-machiavelli, strongly em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
